name: flowmail
description: Turn external-trade mailbox threads into order-state visibility, missing-document alerts, case summaries, and draft replies.

auth.note: Mailbox OAuth is handled by TradeCase OS, not by the skill.

tools.name: connect_mailbox
tools.description: Initiate Gmail or Outlook read-only mailbox OAuth for the current workspace.

tools.name: list_trade_cases
tools.description: List trade cases with optional status and search filters.

tools.name: get_trade_case
tools.description: Return one trade case with analysis details.

tools.name: get_missing_documents
tools.description: List cases that are blocked by missing documents or fields.

tools.name: get_stuck_cases
tools.description: List cases that are currently blocked or need intervention.

tools.name: summarize_case
tools.description: Summarize one trade case for a quick operational update.

tools.name: draft_reply
tools.description: Generate a follow-up draft based on the selected trade case.

tools.name: assistant_query
tools.description: Run a natural-language operational query against the trade-case workspace.
